entry: Today's note: Despite win rate dipped to 48% over the last day, our champion MR_d3_t3_s2 is holding strong at 86/100 survivability, and the timer study says our best hold captures +0.776%/trade. We're playing for data, not dollars, and the data keeps getting cleaner.
good_signals: our champion MR_d3_t3_s2 is holding strong at 86/100 survivability
the timer study says our best hold captures +0.776%/trade
the drop×bounce lab found a 0.227%/trade edge at drop 4.5%→target 4.5%
regime classification is live on 2 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting
watch_items: win rate dipped to 48% over the last day
what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
note: Composed only from true state — never invents wins.
